summary: Completed testing of iteration 6 features: (1) New AI-generated interviewer image with proper face display using object-cover object-top, (2) TTS implementation using browser SpeechSynthesis API with speaking indicators. All backend tests passed (5/5), all frontend features verified working.

backend: Login returns token and user data
frontend: Interviewer panel shows new AI-generated image (data-testid='interviewer-panel')
Image has 'object-cover object-top' for proper face display (full face visible)
Sarah Mitchell · AI Interviewer label visible in panel
Question card (data-testid='question-card') shows Sarah Mitchell name and question
Recording controls: camera toggle, mic toggle, Enable Camera button, question nav 1-5, next question
Top bar: Backend Developer badge, Question X/5 counter, progress bar
Question navigation works: clicking buttons 1-5 changes displayed question
Dashboard loads with 4 stat cards (Total Interviews, Completed, In Progress, Questions Answered)
Dashboard: Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options present
Dashboard: Recent Interviews section with Continue buttons
Landing page footer does NOT contain: Careers, Blog, Press, Help Center (regression)
Landing page footer DOES contain: About Us, Contact Us, Donate Us, Feedback, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested: (1) AI-generated interviewer image showing professional woman headshot with full face visible using object-cover object-top CSS, (2) TTS using browser SpeechSynthesis API - speaks questions aloud when navigating, speaking indicators conditionally render when isSpeaking=true, female voice selected when available. TTS audio cannot be heard in automated tests but code is verified present in LiveInterview.js lines 97-134. Camera access fails in headless browser (expected). 'Send Feedback to Email' remains MOCKED (UI-only placeholder).

mocked_apis.Send Feedback to Email: UI-only placeholder, shows toast confirmation, no backend email service

ai_generated_interviewer_image.styling: object-cover object-top - shows full face properly positioned
ai_generated_interviewer_image.description: Professional AI-generated headshot of woman, replaces Unsplash stock photo

text_to_speech.trigger: Speaks question aloud when currentIndex changes
text_to_speech.voice_selection: Female voice preferred (Samantha, Zira, Karen, etc.)
text_to_speech.note: TTS audio not audible in automated tests, speaking indicator renders conditionally

features_verified.recording_controls: Camera toggle, mic toggle, Enable Camera/Record button, Stop & Submit, question navigation 1-5, next question button
features_verified.footer_regression: Correctly removed: Careers, Blog, Press, Help Center. Kept: About Us, Contact Us, Donate Us, Feedback, Privacy Policy, Terms, Cookie Policy
